title: Linux: `cat ~/.bashrc` run twice in sandbox
body: Testing #313276 It is run twice before it (correctly) fails:
comments: It actually looks like it did not run at all. When I instead use `echo test >/some/writable/path` the LLM does not detect that the command did not run and stops, but the file isn't written to. Only when I then tell it to run the command again will it actually do it.
@chrmarti I cant repro this in wsl. Is this also in  ubuntu 24.04+
Yes. It seems the first run only opens cli.js. This is probably a duplicate issue of https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/312691.

Let's close as dup https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/312691
And I moved that issue to next milestone
